scripts.audit: tsc --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --target ES2022 --outDir ../../.tmp/shared-audit --rootDir src --noEmit false src/audit.ts && node ../../.tmp/shared-audit/audit.js && node scripts/audit-ui-compliance.cjs
scripts.test: tsc --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --target ES2022 --outDir ../../.tmp/shared-tests --rootDir src --noEmit false src/domain.test.ts && node ../../.tmp/shared-tests/domain.test.js
